heading: Failure to furnish information regarding reportable transactions
label: 6707 Failure to furnish information regarding reportable transactions
notes: Amendments2004— amended section catchline and text generally, substituting provisions relating to penalty for failure to furnish information regarding reportable transactions for provisions relating to penalty for failure to furnish information regarding tax shelters.Pub. L. 108–3571997—Subsec. (a)(1). , which directed the substitution of “paragraph (2) or (3), as the case may be” for “paragraph (2)” in subpar. (A) of par. (1), was executed by making the substitution in the concluding provisions of par. (1) to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 105–34, § 1028(d)(2)Subsec. (a)(2). , substituted “Except as provided in paragraph (3), the penalty” for “The penalty”.Pub. L. 105–34, § 1028(d)(1)Subsec. (a)(3). , added par. (3).Pub. L. 105–34, § 1028(b)1986—Subsec. (2) read as follows: “The penalty imposed under paragraph (1) with respect to any tax shelter shall be an amount equal to the greater of—Pub. L. 99–514, § 1532(a)“(A) $500, or“(B) the lesser of (i) 1 percent of the aggregate amount invested in such tax shelter, or (ii) $10,000.The $10,000 limitation in subparagraph (B) shall not apply where there is an intentional disregard of the requirements of section 6111(a).”Subsec. (b)(2). , substituted “$250” for “$50”.Pub. L. 99–514, § 1533(a)

children.text: fails to file such return on or before the date prescribed therefor, or
files false or incomplete information with the Secretary with respect to such transaction,

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), the penalty imposed under subsection (a) with respect to any failure shall be $50,000.

children.label: B
children.text: 50 percent of the gross income derived by such person with respect to aid, assistance, or advice which is provided with respect to the listed transaction before the date the return is filed under section 6111.

children.heading: Rescission authority
children.label: c Rescission authority
children.text: The provisions of section 6707A(d) (relating to authority of Commissioner to rescind penalty) shall apply to any penalty imposed under this section.

children.heading: Reportable and listed transactions
children.label: d Reportable and listed transactions
children.text: For purposes of this section, the terms “reportable transaction” and “listed transaction” have the respective meanings given to such terms by section 6707A(c).
